spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — caret-shape: auto | bar | block | underscore for editable elements…

interactive.rationale: Mode buttons and the Insert key both update the data-mode attribute and computed-style readout.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede uses the same input-mode framing as the feature index: insert, overwrite, and alternate caret shapes.

edge_cases.rationale: The readout includes support detection and the invalid curly keyword rejection branch.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/6106160780017664 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: All colours come from the shared CSS variables and the layout follows the stage + controls editorial pattern.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: clicked insert, overwrite, and OTP modes, then dispatched the Insert key. Computed caret-shape returned bar/block/underscore/bar, invalid curly was false, and console/network were clean.
